summary: 通过：LODE-213 的规格覆盖语义故事 #21/#22、GitHub #200/#213/#214/#215/#216 和只预览不提交边界。
reviewed_validation_summary: package validators passed for Xiaohongshu publish-note precheck and BOSS greet precheck; registry batch validation passed for 10 packages; sensitive-material key scan passed for new write-precheck packages; `PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 -m py_compile tools/lode_validate_package.py` passed and generated cache was removed; `git diff --check` passed; `loom suite validate --target . --item LODE-213 --json` passed; `loom suite evidence validate --target . --item LODE-213 --json` passed; `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item LODE-213 --json` passed; `loom fact-chain --target . --json` passed; `loom verify --target . --json` passed with runtime cache stale advisory only; PR metadata preflight passed after PR body readback; hosted run 28777921930 passed `py-compile`, `demo-bootstrap`, `loom-check`, and `repo-local-cli`, while `loom-pr-merge-gate` blocked on missing review artifacts `.loom/reviews/LODE-213.json` and `.loom/reviews/LODE-213.spec.json`.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: Specification review approved the declared write-precheck scope: generate expected change, risk hints, page requirements, no-submit guardrails, and failure classification for Xiaohongshu draft publishing and BOSS greet preview without live submission.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: Implementation is limited to Lode package assets, registry fixtures, contract docs, validator-consumable samples, and item-specific carrier.
